 10597            {

 614                    }

 626                    }
 627                    // SecurityTraceRecordHelper.TracePendingSessionClosed(sessionId, this.Uri);
 628                }

 661                     TD.SecuritySessionRatio(GetPendingSessionCount(), this.MaximumPendingSessions);

 1071            {

 201078                }

 1081                // to renew the key in order to send the close.

 1083                    message.Headers.Action != Settings.SecurityStandardsManager.SecureConversationDriver.CloseAction.Val

 1093                    }
 1094                }

 1096                // session token.
 1097                lock (LocalLock)

 1099                    if (_futureSessionTokens.Count > 0 && incomingToken.KeyGeneration != _currentSessionToken.KeyGenerat

 01105                            {

 01112                                changedCurrentSessionToken = true;
 01113                                break;
 01114                            }
 01115                        }
 01116                        if (changedCurrentSessionToken)
 1117                        {
 1118                            // SecurityTraceRecordHelper.TraceServerSessionKeyUpdated(this.currentSessionToken, GetLocal
 01119                            // remove all renewed tokens that will never be used.

 1126                    }
 01127                }
 1128
 1129                return true;
 201130            }

 1603                closeMessage.Properties.AllowOutputBatching = false;
 1604                return closeMessage;

 1607            protected async Task SendCloseAsync(CancellationToken token)

 1610                {

 01612                    {

 101627            protected async Task SendMessageAsync(RequestContext requestContext, Message message, CancellationToken toke
 1628            {

 101630                {
 1631                    await requestContext.ReplyAsync(message, token);
 101632                    await requestContext.CloseAsync(token);
 1633                }
 1634            }

 01704            private void CleanupPendingCloseState()
 1705            {

 1707                {
 01708                    if (_closeResponse != null)
 01709                    {

 01714                    {

 01716                        _closeRequestContext = null;
 01717                    }
 1718                }
 1719            }

 01721            protected override void AbortCore()

 1726            }

 81734            public virtual Task CloseAsync(CancellationToken token)

 1738            protected async Task OnCloseAsync(CancellationToken token)

 01742                if (wasAborted)
 1743                {
 81744                    return;
 81745                }
 1746                await CloseCoreAsync(token);
 1747            }
 1748
 81749            private bool ShouldSendCloseResponseOnClose(out RequestContext pendingCloseRequestContext, out Message pendi
 81750            {

 81753                {
 1754                    _canSendCloseResponse = true;

 81756                    {

 81760                        pendingCloseResponse = _closeResponse;

 1762                        _closeRequestContext = null;
 1763                    }
 01764                    else
 01765                    {

 1767                        pendingCloseRequestContext = null;
 01768                        pendingCloseResponse = null;
 81769                    }
 1770                }
 1771                return sendCloseResponse;
 1772            }

 1807                        }
 1808                    }
 81809                }
 81810

 01815            {

 02036            protected override void AbortCore()

 02041                CleanupPendingCloseState();
 02042                _inputSessionCloseHandle.Abort(_duplexCommObj);
 2043                _outputSessionCloseHandle.Abort(_duplexCommObj);
 2044            }
 2045
 02046            private void CleanupPendingCloseState()
 2047            {

 2049                {
 02050                    if (_closeResponseMessage != null)
 02051                    {
 2052                        _closeResponseMessage.Close();
 02053                        _closeResponseMessage = null;
 2054                    }
 02055                    if (_closeRequestContext != null)
 02056                    {
 2057                        _closeRequestContext.Abort();
 02058                        _closeRequestContext = null;
 02059                    }
 2060                }
 2061            }

 02063            public void Abort()

 02068            public Task CloseAsync()

 2073            public async Task CloseAsync(CancellationToken token)
 22074            {
 2075                // step 1: close output session
 2076                await CloseOutputSessionAsync(token);
 22077
 2078                // if the channel was aborted while closing the output session, return
 02079                if (State == CommunicationState.Closed)
 2080                {
 2081                    return;
 2082                }
 2083                // step 2: wait for input session to be closed
 2084
 22085                bool wasAborted;
 22086                bool didInputSessionClose;
 2087                (didInputSessionClose, wasAborted) = await WaitForInputSessionCloseAsync(ServiceDefaults.CloseTimeout);
 02088                if (wasAborted)
 2089                {
 2090                    return;
 22091                }
 2092
 02093                if (!didInputSessionClose)
 2094                {
 2095                    throw DiagnosticUtility.ExceptionUtility.ThrowHelperWarning(new TimeoutException(SR.Format(SR.Servic
 2096                }
 2097
 22098                // wait for any concurrent CloseOutputSessions to finish
 22099                bool didOutputSessionClose;
 2100                (didOutputSessionClose, wasAborted) = await WaitForOutputSessionCloseAsync(ServiceDefaults.CloseTimeout)
 02101                if (wasAborted)
 2102                {
 2103                    return;
 22104                }
 2105
 02106                if (!didOutputSessionClose)
 2107                {
 2108                    throw DiagnosticUtility.ExceptionUtility.ThrowHelperWarning(new TimeoutException(SR.Format(SR.Servic
 22109                }
 22110
 22111                await CloseDuplexSessionChannelAsync(token);
 22112                await CloseCoreAsync(token);
 2113                Settings.RemoveSessionChannel(_session.Id);
 2114            }
 2115
 22116            private async Task CloseDuplexSessionChannelAsync(CancellationToken token)
 22117            {
 2118                TimeoutHelper timeoutHelper = new TimeoutHelper(TimeSpan.FromMinutes(30));
 22119                await ((ISessionChannel<IDuplexSession>)_duplexSessionChannel).Session.CloseOutputSessionAsync(timeoutHe
 22120
 2121                TimeSpan iterationTimeout = timeoutHelper.RemainingTime();
 02122                bool lastIteration = (iterationTimeout == TimeSpan.Zero);
 2123
 22124                while (true)
 22125                {
 2126                    Message message = null;
 2127                    bool receiveThrowing = true;
 22128                    try
 2129                    {
 22130                        (Message receiveMessage, bool success) = await _duplexSessionChannel.TryReceiveAsync(timeoutHelp
 22131
 2132                        receiveThrowing = false;
 22133                        if (success && receiveMessage == null)
 22134                        {
 2135                            await _duplexSessionChannel.CloseAsync(timeoutHelper.GetCancellationToken());
 02136                            return;
 2137                        }
 2138                    }
 02139                    catch (Exception e)
 02140                    {
 2141                        if (Fx.IsFatal(e))
 02142                            throw;
 2143
 02144                        if (receiveThrowing)
 2145                        {
 2146                            receiveThrowing = false;
 2147                        }
 02148                        else
 2149                        {
 02150                            throw;
 2151                        }
 2152                    }
 22153                    finally
 02154                    {
 2155                        if (message != null)
 22156                            message.Close();
 02157
 2158                        if (receiveThrowing)
 2159                            _duplexSessionChannel.Abort();
 02160                    }
 2161
 2162                    if (lastIteration || _duplexSessionChannel.State != CommunicationState.Opened)
 02163                        break;
 02164
 02165                    iterationTimeout = timeoutHelper.RemainingTime();
 2166                    lastIteration = (iterationTimeout == TimeSpan.Zero);
 02167                }
 22168
 2169                _duplexSessionChannel.Abort();
 2170            }
 2171
 22172            private void DetermineCloseOutputSessionMessage(out bool sendClose, out bool sendCloseResponse, out Message 
 22173            {
 22174                sendClose = false;
 22175                sendCloseResponse = false;
 22176                pendingCloseResponseMessage = null;
 2177                pendingCloseRequestContext = null;
 22178                lock (LocalLock)
 2179                {
 22180                    if (!_isOutputClosed)
 22181                    {
 2182                        _isOutputClosed = true;
 22183                        if (_receivedClose)
 2184                        {
 22185                            if (_closeResponseMessage != null)
 22186                            {
 22187                                pendingCloseResponseMessage = _closeResponseMessage;
 22188                                pendingCloseRequestContext = _closeRequestContext;
 22189                                _closeResponseMessage = null;
 2190                                _closeRequestContext = null;
 2191                                sendCloseResponse = true;
 2192                            }
 2193                        }
 02194                        else
 02195                        {
 2196                            sendClose = true;
 2197                            _sentClose = true;
 22198                        }
 2199
 22200                        _outputSessionCloseHandle.Reset();
 22201                    }
 2202                }
 2203            }
 2204
 22205            private async Task CloseOutputSessionAsync(CancellationToken token)
 22206            {
 2207                bool sendClose = false;
 2208                bool sendCloseResponse = false;
 2209                Message pendingCloseResponseMessage;
 2210                RequestContext pendingCloseRequestContext;
 22211                try
 22212                {
 2213                    DetermineCloseOutputSessionMessage(out sendClose, out sendCloseResponse, out pendingCloseResponseMes
 22214                    if (sendCloseResponse)
 2215                    {
 2216                        bool cleanupCloseState = true;
 22217                        try
 22218                        {
 22219                            await SendCloseResponseAsync(pendingCloseRequestContext, pendingCloseResponseMessage, token)
 2220                            cleanupCloseState = false;
 2221                        }
 22222                        finally
 2223                        {
 02224                            if (cleanupCloseState)
 02225                            {
 2226                                pendingCloseResponseMessage.Close();
 2227                                pendingCloseRequestContext.Abort();
 2228                            }
 02229                        }
 2230                    }
 02231                    else if (sendClose)
 2232                    {
 22233                        await SendCloseAsync(token);
 02234                    }
 2235                }
 02236                catch (CommunicationObjectAbortedException)
 2237                {
 02238                    if (State != CommunicationState.Closed) throw;
 2239                    // a parallel thread aborted the channel. ignore the exception
 2240                }
 22241                finally
 2242                {
 22243                    if (sendClose || sendCloseResponse)
 2244                    {
 2245                        _outputSessionCloseHandle.Set();
 22246                    }
 2247                }
 2248            }

 22402                }

 2427                private async Task CloseOutputSessionAsync(TimeSpan timeout)

 2455                        }

 2460            public class ServerSecurityDuplexSessionChannelDispatcher : ServerSecurityDuplexSessionChannel, IDuplexSessi
